title: Living with your parents is cool

transcript.text: Hey, hey, hey, this video is what I think about living with your parents, what it's like to live with your parents, what do I think about living with your parents, I think it's cool, I guess it's a new thing that's going on these days, boomerang kids, people living with their parents when they're in their 30s and their 40s even, you know, maybe even never even moving out, you know, it's like a normal thing in a foreign country, you know, like in Chile, dude, for five years I lived in Chile, dude,

For like three years of that I lived with my wife and her family, she lived with her parents and her kid lived with her parents and she lived with her brother and her sister and her brother, I mean her brother and his wife and their two kids and then my wife's other brother and then there was this kid who they adopted because he didn't, his mama couldn't take care of him because he had like 11 kids and then, you know, me and then her two parents
